subcodes.first_line: O family beloved of God! That household has ever been enamored of the loving Friend yet afflicted by the cruelty of [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای خاندان محبت الله آن خانواده همواره دلداده دلبر مهربان بودند و آزرده از جفای
subcodes.subjects: @martyrs and martyrdom, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @service to others; to the Cause of God
